response:
Emily started the week with 25 dogs and added 4 puppies on Thursday plus 1 stray on Friday, bringing the total to 30 before the weekend adoptions. On Saturday, 2 families adopted 3 dogs each, meaning 6 dogs left the center, which leaves her with 24 dogs currently. You can contact her at [phone number] or visit the location at [street address] to learn more about [adoption fees]. Please bring your [identification document] and fill out the [application form] before arriving at [visit time].

***

The rescue center relies on donations and volunteers to care for the animals listed in the [inventory list] and [medical records]. If you wish to support the cause, you can send funds to the [bank account] or drop off supplies at the [drop off point]. Every contribution helps ensure that the [rescue mission] continues successfully for all the dogs in need.
